tasks.action: Measure sunflower height in Bed A

prompt.en: Stand next to the sunflower -- is it up to your knees? Your belly? Your shoulder?
prompt.da: Stil dig ved siden af solsikken -- naar den til dine knae? Din mave? Din skulder?

prompt.en: Daily strawberry check -- only the red ones!
Summer sun dries out beds faster -- check twice if it's really hot.
prompt.da: Sommersolen toerrer bedene hurtigere ud -- tjek to gange hvis det er rigtig varmt.

tasks.action: Train cucumber onto trellis in Bed C

prompt.en: Gently tie the cucumber stem to the trellis with soft string.
prompt.da: Bind forsigtigt agurkstilken til espalieren med bloedt snor.

tasks.action: Harvest spring onions from Bed D (first batch ready)

prompt.en: Pull a spring onion up -- smell it! Want to try a bite?
prompt.da: Traek et foraarsloeg op -- lugt til det! Vil du proeve en bid?

growth_events.event: Sunflower growing rapidly -- visible daily height increase

prompt.en: The sunflower grew since yesterday! Can you see the difference?
prompt.da: Solsikken er vokset siden i gaar! Kan du se forskellen?

growth_events.event: Bean seedlings emerging in Bed E

prompt.en: The bean pushed the soil up like a strongman! See the arch?
prompt.da: Boennen skubbede jorden op som en staerk mand! Ser du buen?

sowing_tasks.action: Sow fifth succession radish in Bed C
Sow third spring onion batch in Bed D
Sow second bush bean seeds in Bed E
